title: Embedded Software Architect - Diagnostics and OTA
description: We are looking for an Embedded Software Architect to lead AUTOSAR ECU integration, diagnostics, UDS, DoIP, CAN, Ethernet, SOME/IP, secure boot, secure flashing, OTA software update architecture, ISO 26262, ISO 24089, and UNECE R155/R156 compliance. German required for supplier and homologation workshops.

title: Computer Vision Engineer - Edge AI
description: Build edge AI perception prototypes using Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, YOLO, Docker, Linux, and GPU benchmarking. Experience with embedded deployment, real-time constraints, and cross-functional engineering teams is helpful.

title: Frontend Product Engineer
description: Develop React and TypeScript interfaces for a SaaS analytics product. The role focuses on design systems, browser performance, GraphQL APIs, and product experimentation. Automotive embedded software experience is not required.
